derelict_terminal.text: A derelict terminal still glows in the dark, cursor blinking like it's been waiting for you.

success.text: Old crypto-wallets crack open. Someone's rainy-day fund is now yours.

failure.text: Counter-intrusion bites back — feedback arcs up your arm.

outcome.text: You step past. The cursor blinks on behind you, patient as ever.

healing_pod.text: A medical pod hums in an alcove, its glass fogged, its systems miraculously intact.

outcome.text: Warm gel, soft light, a chime like a hotel bell. You step out whole.
No time to nap in strange machinery.

vending_machine.text: A vending machine flickers to life as you pass, playing a jingle from a company that no longer exists.

choices.text: Pay 10 cr for a mystery can.

outcome.text: It dispenses a warm can of Stim Tea and thanks you in three dead languages.
The jingle loops sadly behind you.

glitch_shrine.text: A knot of corrupted holograms has arranged itself into something like a shrine. It radiates... goodwill?

outcome.text: The glitch settles over your shoulders like a mantle. Your strikes feel guided. (+3 attack this run)

trapped_crate.text: A supply crate sits in the open, suspiciously pristine, practically gift-wrapped.

success.text: Inside: hard currency and no regrets.

failure.text: The lid was the trap. The blast leaves your ears ringing.

flirt_hologram.text: A hostess hologram sparks awake — gorgeous, glitching, delighted to see a guest after all these years. She blows you a pixelated kiss.

outcome.text: She laughs, dips you in a dance hold that isn't there, and somehow you leave lighter on your feet.
She curtsies, unbothered. "The Substrate keeps all its beautiful things. You'll be back."
